# CWE-649: Reliance on Obfuscation without Integrity Checking (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-649-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// Vulnerable: role is base64-encoded in a cookie and trusted without integrity verification.
func AdminDashboard(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	c, err := r.Cookie("profile")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	decoded, _ := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(c.Value)
	if strings.Contains(string(decoded), "role=admin") {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"panel": "admin"})
		return
	}
	http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
}
